description: Mens Braided Stretch Belt. Style - Mens elasticated braided belt with 1.5" wide webbing and traditional bridle buckle. Perfect for everyday wear. Perfect Fit - Simply inset the belt pin through the elasticated braided fabric, which mean no holes are required and you'll have a perfect fit everytime. Sizes - These belts come in 2 sizes M-L (32-38") and L-XL (38-44"). Colours - Available in Black, Navy, Dark Grey, Khaki and Stone. Material - Made using high quality, durable and elasticated fabric, which adapts to your body as you move and will ensure longevitity.
